description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay. Define a CONTAINER_IMAGE variable as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG and a single stage named build. Add a Build job in the build stage that runs the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules.
